```{=html}
<div style="width:84%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1em;align-items:center;">

  <div style="display:flex;gap:0.8em;justify-content:center;">
   <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.6em;box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(44,62,80,0.12);border:1px solid #EFE6D6;">
    <img src="figs/cooking-oil.png" alt="Cooking oil icon" style="width:5.2em;height:5.2em;object-fit:contain;display:block;border-radius:9px;" />
   </div>
   <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.6em;box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(44,62,80,0.12);border:1px solid #EFE6D6;">
    <img src="figs/light-soy-sauce.png" alt="Light soy sauce icon" style="width:5.2em;height:5.2em;object-fit:contain;display:block;border-radius:9px;" />
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="text-align:left;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.55em;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:0.6em;background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.8em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.08);border-left:3px solid #2C8475;">
    <i data-lucide="lock" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.9;color:#2C8475;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:0.1em;"></i>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;"><strong style="color:#2C8475;">Held still:</strong> the bottle, cork, framing, and the label text composited on by a script.</div>
   </div>
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:0.6em;background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.55em 0.8em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(212,95,71,0.08);border-left:3px solid #D45F47;">
    <i data-lucide="shuffle" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.9;color:#D45F47;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:0.1em;"></i>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;"><strong style="color:#D45F47;">Left random:</strong> only the liquid, which should differ in color and texture.</div>
   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.9em;text-align:center;font-size:0.48em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.5;">
  Image-to-image against a saved reference + a text-compositing script. The reader just sees a matched set.
 </div>

</div>
```
